required_spec: 12 in diameter by 6 in high steel vessel or equivalent blank; thickness near 0.079 in; low-carbon steel preferred for first prototype
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Actual grade and thickness drive the first-pass K assumption.

required_spec: Integral shell top or welded steel top compatible with 0.079 in tongue field
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Avoid unknown hardened or heavily stressed salvage until measured.

required_spec: Low-profile rubber feet or grommet supports; non-rattling; mechanically isolated from tongues
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Mounting can shift pitch and sustain.

required_spec: Medium-soft rubber or yarn-wrapped mallets; repeatable hardness for validation
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Mallet hardness must be recorded in validation.

required_spec: Non-rattling edge trim compatible with finish and hand contact
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Avoid added mass near tongues unless measured after install.

required_spec: Corrosion-resistant finish or oil/wax compatible with struck instrument use
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Finish mass and cure can move pitch.

required_spec: Files, deburring wheel, abrasive pad, fine abrasive sheets
cost_basis: rough planning estimate; verify before purchase
notes: Deburr must smooth without uncontrolled thinning.

required_spec: Chromatic tuner or spectrum app, microphone, calipers, notebook
